intentAndPurpose.intent: Single-selection control within a mutually-exclusive option group.

rules.name: default
useWhen: standard option in a radio group

rules.name: readOnly
useWhen: display-only, value shown but cannot change

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent appearance role. Controls border, hover, AND fill tokens. `auto` → secondary stack.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: When set, names the control via `aria-labelledby` (e.g. `RadioField` single-option layout where the visible label lives on the field, not on this `Radio`).

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether this option is selected. Selection is owned by the parent **`RadioGroup`** via `value` / `defaultValue` matching this `value`. This prop is accepted for tooling (e.g. Storybook) and is **not** forwarded to the underlying primitive.

props.name: description
props.description: Supplementary copy below the label row when using the integrated stack.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label beside the control (optional; `children` remain the default label API).

props.name: labelAssociation
props.description: How string label / description associate with the control (mirrors `Input` / `Checkbox`). - `native`: outer `

props.name: labelSuffixInside
props.description: Rendered after label text inside the label element (e.g. required asterisk).

props.name: labelTrailing
props.description: Rendered after the label element on the same row (e.g. info control).

props.name: labelWrapper
props.description: Outer wrapper element. Use `'div'` inside a field composition so the visible label is not nested inside a second `<label>`.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether this radio is read-only (focusable but value cannot change)

props.name: supplementaryDescribedById
props.description: When `labelAssociation="field"`, merged onto the control `aria-describedby` for auxiliary copy outside `Field.Description` (e.g. field-level helper rows). In `native` mode it is concatenated into the `aria-describedby` string.

codeSnippets.title: Basic Usage
codeSnippets.code:
import { Radio, RadioGroup } from '@oneui/ui';

<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <Radio value="a">Option A</Radio>
  <Radio value="b">Option B</Radio>
</RadioGroup>
